abilities.name: Banished Knowledge
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

An Ally within :{SOI}: Gains :{Haste}:.
Reduce the :{SP}: cost of the Discipline by 1 if the target is an ally other than yourself.
abilities.flavorText: There is safety in not knowing.

abilities.name: Last Laugh
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
If you or a :{Loyal Esper}: is Defeated, the figure that dealt the Damage is dealt their 2 :{Conviction Dice}: worth of :{Magic Dmg}:.
:{Exhaust}:
When you or a :{Loyal Esper}: is dealt Damage by an opponent, you may deal the source of that Damage 2 :{Irreducible Dmg}:.

abilities.name: Familiar
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
After learning this Discipline, choose a :{Familar}: and place it face up next to your Adventurer card.
Your :{Familar}: cannot be changed.

abilities.name: Forebode
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:
At any time, re-roll a roll you made or that was made against you. Limited by your highest :{Lvl}: :{Assemblage}: Discipline.
:{Lvl 1}:+: Dodge rolls or Skill Check rolls
:{Lvl 2}:+: Spell Casting rolls
:{Lvl 3}:+: Conviction rolls or Attack rolls
:{Lvl 4}:+: Any rolls

abilities.name: Perfect Love
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:
Before an ally within :{SOI}: would :{Determine Damage}: from an Attack made against them, or :{Resolve the Spell's Effect}: from a Spell made against them, :{Redirect}: to yourself or a :{Loyal Esper}:.
abilities.flavorText: There is no fear in love.

abilities.name: Euthanasia
abilities.description:
Cast a :{Spell 6}:.
Inflict :{Wilt}: and deal 4 :{Magic Damage}:. Then, if the target was already Inflicted with :{Wilt}:, Inflict :{Condemn}:. If they were already Inflicted with both :{Condemn}: and :{Wilt}:, roll the :{Black Die}:. If :{Skull}: is rolled, the target is defeated.

abilities.name: Sanctuary
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:
At any time, an ally within :{SOI}: may :{Dodge}:.
abilities.flavorText: Here there is safety.

abilities.name: BFF
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:
At any time, when making an Attack, you or a :{Loyal Esper}: you've Summoned Gains the following:
:[:{Star}: :{FU}:: :{Move 3}: spaces without provoking Break Attacks, then make a :{Melee/Ranged Attack}: :{Atk}: against a different target.]:

abilities.name: Imposed Paradigm
abilities.description:
Cast a :{Spell 6}:.
:{Swap}: places with the target.
abilities.flavorText: A lie told often enough becomes the truth.

abilities.name: Possession
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:
A :{Loyal Esper}: within :{SOI}: makes a :{Melee/Ranged Attack}: :{Atk}: or you may spend 1 :{SP}: and another ally within :{SOI}: makes a :{Melee/Ranged Attack}: *ATK* instead.
abilities.flavorText: Let us end this debate! There is such thing as free will, and I shall take yours as my own.

abilities.name: Ruination
abilities.description:
Cast a :{Spell 6}: against up to 2 different opponents within :{SOI}:. Reduce the :{SP}: cost of this discipline by 1 if all targets have an :{Effect}:
Roll your :{Casting Die}:, deal :{Magic Dmg}: equal to the result.
abilities.flavorText: Ruin attends the wicked.

abilities.name: Fortune Telling
abilities.description:
:{Once Per Encounter}:
After a figure within your :{SOI}: has rolled for any reason, choose the result of any single die except the :{Black Die}:.
abilities.flavorText: Fortune, good night; smile once more, turn thy wheel.

abilities.name: Summoning
abilities.description:
:{Once Per Encounter}:
Summon a :{Loyal Esper}: within your :{SOI}:. Then gain 1 :{Summon Token}:.
:{Passive}:
At anytime, :{Discard}: a :{Summon Token}: to reduce any non-:{Irreducible Damage}: being dealt to a :{Loyal Esper}: you control by 2.

abilities.name: Conduit Summoning
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
* Any time an opponent is Defeated within :{SOI}:, Earn their :{Conduit}: card.
* :{1 SP}:: At any time, replace your Adventurer card with a :{Conduit}: that you have Earned. Or, replace your current :{Conduit}: with your Adventurer card.

abilities.name: Exalted Summoning
abilities.description:
:{Once Per Encounter}:
Choose an :{Exalted Esper}: and use its Ability within :{SOI}:.

abilities.name: The Pessimist
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
When an opponent within :{SOI}: fails a Conviction Check by 3 or more, Inflict :{Condemn}:.
abilities.flavorText: With the choice of two evils, I'll take both.

abilities.name: Helping Hands
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
You may equip an additional :{Consumable}: and :{Relic}:.
:{Exhaust}:
Move up to 2 spaces. Gain :{Flight}: during this movement.

abilities.name: Resonance
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:
:[:{Star}::{FU}:: Use an un-flipped Discipline you have learned that costs :{1-3 SP}:. Any Conditions excluding :{SP}: cost still apply. This Discipline may target a different figure.]:

abilities.name: Friends With Benefits
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
* When you use the Discipline :{Summoning}:, Gain 1 additional :{Summon Token}:.
* :{Loyal Espers}: you summon gain :{+1 Defense}:.

abilities.name: Felled Afterlife
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
When an opponent within your :{SOI}: is Defeated, this card Gains 1 :{Energy Token}:. (Limit 2). When determining the Force of a Spell, if you have 2 :{Energy Tokens}: on this card, Gain :{+1}: to the Force.
:{Once Per Encounter}:
Discard 2 :{Energy Tokens}: from this card to Gain 2 :{Enslaved Spirits}:.

abilities.name: The Tower Reversed
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:
Cast a :{Spell 6}:.
Deal :{3 Magic Damage}: for each Effect the target has.
Then, Inflict :{Darkness}:, :{Disease}:, and :{Paralyze}:.

abilities.name: Soul Bond
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
* When you use the Discipline :{Summoning}:, Gain 1 additional :{Summon Token}:.
* Whenever a :{Loyal Esper}: you Summoned spends :{SP}: to make any Action or Ability, they may spend :{SP}: that you have availible instead of their own. If either you or your :{Loyal Espers}: Gain or lose a :{Positive Effect}:, you each also Gain or lose that Effect.

abilities.name: Life Tithe
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

An opponent within your :{SOI}: is dealt :{Magic Dmg}: equal to your highest level :{Discipline:Cruor}: Discipline.
abilities.flavorText: I am part of that power which eternally wills evil and eternally works good.

abilities.name: Crumbling Time
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

Cast a :{Spell:6}:
Your target is Inflicted with :{Wilt}:.
abilities.flavorText: We are Time's subjects and Time bids; be gone.

abilities.name: Imbued Fear
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

When making an Attack, this Attack Gains:
:[* :{Physical Dmg:+2}:
* :{FU}:: Inflict :{Darkness}:, :{Calc:Force X + Difference Hit}:. Where :{X}: equals :{6}: plus the LVL of your highest :{Discipline:Cruor}: Discipline. ]:

abilities.name: Gore Shot
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

Cast a :{Spell:6}:
Deal :{Magic Dmg:2}.
You may deal yourself :{Irreducible Dmg:2}: to deal additional :{Magic Dmg}: equal to :{2X}: your highest LVL :{Discipline:Cruor}: Discipline.

abilities.name: Oxygen Syphon
abilities.description:
Cast a :{Spell:6}: against all opponents within :{SOI}:.
Inflict :{Disease}:.
abilities.flavorText: I am a thief of what all men need.

abilities.name: Corrosive Ideal
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

Cast a :{Spell:6}:
Your target is Inflicted with :{Poison}:.
abilities.flavorText: A thing is not necessarily true because a man dies for it.

abilities.name: To Faust
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
The first time each turn you are dealt :{2}: or more Damage from a single source, Gain a :{Vow}: token.
abilities.flavorText: Gain evidence of higher powers by visible acts which everywhere separate life from death.

abilities.name: Bring The Shadows
abilities.description: Make a :{Move}:. During this movement you do not provoke Break Attacks and you may move through opponents with no penalty. You may not increase this movement with :{SP}:. Then, cast a :{Spell:6}: against each moved through, ignoring :{SOI}: and Line of Sight. Roll your Casting die, Deal :{Magic Dmg}: equal to the result and Inflict :{Darkness}:.

abilities.name: Blood Pact
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
When making an Attack, you may deal yourself :{Irreducible Dmg}: equal to up to :{2X}: your highest LVL :{Discipline:Cruor}: Discipline to add the same amount of :{Physical Dmg}: to your Attack.

abilities.name: Blood Toll
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

Deal yourself :{Irreducible Dmg:2}: and Gain :{SP:+2}:.
abilities.flavorText: Pleasure without conscience.

abilities.name: Root The Mind
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

Cast a :{Spell:6}:.
Your target is Inflicted with :{Paralyze}:.
abilities.flavorText: To subdue the enemy without fighting is the acme of skill.

abilities.name: In Dreams
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

When you hit with an Attack or the target or the target of a spell you cast fails their Conviction Check, Gain a :{Vow}: token.
abilities.flavorText: Hope is a waking dream.

abilities.name: Soul Steal
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
At the start of your turn, you and an ally within :{SOI}: may redistribute any :{Damage}: token you have between each other.
:{Exhaust}:

Cast a :{Spell:6}:. Deal :{Magic Dmg}: equal to half your total Damage.

abilities.name: Organic Liquify
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

Cast a :{Spell:6}:.
Roll one of your target's Conviction Dice, Deal :{Magic Dmg}: equal to the result.
You may deal yourself :{Irreducible Dmg:2}: to deal additional :{Magic Dmg}: equal to :{2X}: your highest LVL :{Discipline:Cruor}: Discipline.

abilities.name: Wretched Tether
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

Cast a :{Spell:6}: against another figure.
The target Gains the :{Tether}: Special Effect token.
abilities.flavorText: Bad company corrupts good character.

abilities.name: In Secret
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
:{SP:2}:: Make a :{Move}:. You have :{Flight}: for the duration of this movement.
:{Exhaust}:

Deal yourself :{Irreducible Dmg:2}: and Gain a :{Vow}: token.

abilities.name: Life Grasp
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

Cast a :{Spell:6}: against up to 3 different opponents within :{SOI}:.
Deal :{Magic Dmg}: equal to the difference rolled on their failed Conviction Checks. After rolling to determine the Force of this Spell, you may deal yourself :{Irreducible Dmg:6}: to add :{+6}: to your roll.

abilities.name: Sinful Privilege
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

When choosing the target of an Attack or Spell, you may instead target an opponent that is adjacent to an Ally with no penalty regardless of Line of Sight or Range.
abilities.flavorText: Hear no evil, see no evil, and you will never be invited to a party.

abilities.name: Soul Pact
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
While you are Defeated, if the opponent that Defeated you is also Defeated, you may :{Flip}: this card to immediately place your figure on the board anywhere within an ally's :{SOI}: then :{Heal}: equal to half of your Maximum :{HP}:.

abilities.name: He Watches
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
*Anytime you Gain a :{Vow}: token, another ally within your :{SOI}: without a :{Vow}: token may also Gain a :{Vow}: token.
* The first time each turn an ally Gains a :{Vow}: token, they may deal themselves :{Irreducible Dmg:2}: to gain another :{Vow}: token.

abilities.name: Ineptitude
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

Before an opponent within :{SOI}: rolls for any reason, that roll recieves :{-3}:.
abilities.flavorText: A tax on the foolish.

abilities.name: Abbadon's Subtlety
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

After resolving an Attack or Spell you made, cast a :{Spell:6}:.
Deal your target :{Magic Dmg}: equal to the amount of Damage the previous Attack or Spell dealt. After dealing this Damage, end your turn.

abilities.name: Anticipated Attack
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
When making a Dodge, Gain:
:[:{Book:4}: :{+1}: to Dodge.]:

abilities.name: Blade Works
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

If you have 2 1-handed :{Melee Weapon}: Weapons equipped, make a :{Melee Weapon}: :{ATK}:.
abilities.flavorText: Perfection comes through toil.

abilities.name: Chains Of Command
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

When making a :{Melee Weapon}: :{ATK}:, this Attack Gains:
:[* :{Reach:2}:
* :{Burst}: :{FU}:: :{Command:3}:, :{Calc:Force X + Difference Hit}:. Where :{X}: equals :{6}: plus the :{LVL}: of your highest :{Discipline:Martial}: Discipline.]:

abilities.name: Critical Defense
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
*At the start of every Encounter, Gain :{1}: :{Dodge Token}:.
*Your Attacks Gain:
:[:{Burst}: :{FU}:: Gain a :{Dodge Token}:.]:

abilities.name: Hammer Helm
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
Your Attacks Gain:
:[:{Physical Damage:+1}:]:.
:{Exhaust}:

When making a :{Melee Attack}: Attack, if you have a 2-handed Weapon equipped, you may re-roll any dice in your Combat Dice Pool.

abilities.name: Fortuitous Homicide
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

:{Counter}:
abilities.flavorText: There are four kinds of homicide: felonious, excusable justifiable, and praiseworthy.

abilities.name: Living Bulwark
abilities.description:
:{Once Per Encounter}:
At any time, Gain :{Resistance:Physical DMG}: until the end of your next turn.
In addition, you may :{Counter}: for free until the end of next turn.

abilities.name: Blood Rage
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
When you have Damage equal to at least half your maximum :{HP}:, Gain an additional :{SP}: during your Stamina Point Recovery Phase.

abilities.name: Onslaught
abilities.description:
Make a :{Melee Attack}: :{ATK}:. This Attack Gains:
:[:{FU}:: Make a :{Melee Attack}: :{ATK}:.]:
The above :{FU}: Attack also Gains:
:[:{FU}:: Make a :{Melee Attack}: :{ATK}:.]:

abilities.name: Dead End
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

Before rolling for a :{Melee Attack}: Attack, if you have 2-handed Weapon equipped, you Gain :{Shield:+X}:. Where X equals your highest :{LVL}: :{Discipline:Martial}: Discipline.

abilities.name: Mage Breaker
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

When determining Damage, roll the opponent's Casting die and add the number rolled as :{Physical Dmg}: to this Attack.
abilities.flavorText: Your hubris will be your undoing.

abilities.name: Physically Perfected
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
Gain :{+X}: :{Icon:Health}:. Where :{X}: is equal to your highest :{LVL}: :{Martial}: Discipline.
:{Exhaust}:

When making an Attack, this Attack Gains:
:[:{Icon:Burst}: :{FU}:: Gain :{+1}: :{SP}:.]:

abilities.name: Promise
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

Before rolling for for a :{Icon:MeleeAttack}: Attack, Gain :{+X TO THE ATK ROLL}:, where :{X}: equals the amount of times you've resolved an Attack against the target this turn.

abilities.name: Whirlwind
abilities.description: Make a separate :{Icon:MeleeAttack}: :{ATK}: against each figure currently adjacent to you. If your equipped Weapon(s) has :{Reach}:, you may spend 1 additional :{SP}: to Attack all figures currently within the :{Reach}: of the Weapon(s) instead.

abilities.name: Morbid Envy
abilities.description:
:{Exhaust}:

When making an Attack, this Attack Gains :{+X PHYSICAL DMG}:. Where :{X}: equals the current roll on one of your Combat Dice.
abilities.flavorText: It is not my intention to be fulsome, but I must confess that I covet your skull.

abilities.name: Bring The Wrath
abilities.description:
:{Passive}:
:{1 SP}:: When you Defeat an opponent, you may end the current Action and all Abilities. If you do, you may move up to :(3}: spaces and make a :{Icon:MeleeRangeAttack}: :{ATK}:.
